'''鈭歳-m-zh-p''' ('''karamzhepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yield|yield]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-m-zh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yield|yield]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歳-m-zh-p
|-
! Lemma
| karamzhepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiramzhepoko|thiramzhepoko]] || [[word:jiramzhepoko|jiramzhepoko]] || [[word:shiramzhepoko|shiramzhepoko]] || [[word:kiramzhepoko|kiramzhepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuramzhepoko|thuthuramzhepoko]] || [[word:jujuramzhepoko|jujuramzhepoko]] || [[word:shushuramzhepoko|shushuramzhepoko]] || [[word:kukuramzhepoko|kukuramzhepoko]]
|-

|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuramzhepoko|thuramzhepoko]] || [[word:juramzhepoko|juramzhepoko]] || [[word:shuramzhepoko|shuramzhepoko]] || [[word:kuramzhepoko|kuramzhepoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoramzhepoko|thothoramzhepoko]] || [[word:jojoramzhepoko|jojoramzhepoko]] || [[word:shoshoramzhepoko|shoshoramzhepoko]] || [[word:kokoramzhepoko|kokoramzhepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoramzhepoko|thoramzhepoko]] || [[word:joramzhepoko|joramzhepoko]] || [[word:shoramzhepoko|shoramzhepoko]] || [[word:koramzhepoko|koramzhepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoramzhepoko|thoramzhepoko]] || [[word:joramzhepoko|joramzhepoko]] || [[word:shoramzhepoko|shoramzhepoko]] || [[word:koramzhepoko|koramzhepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙ramzhepoko|th忙ramzhepoko]] || [[word:j忙ramzhepoko|j忙ramzhepoko]] || [[word:sh忙ramzhepoko|sh忙ramzhepoko]] || [[word:k忙ramzhepoko|k忙ramzhepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharamzhepoko|thatharamzhepoko]] || [[word:jajaramzhepoko|jajaramzhepoko]] || [[word:shasharamzhepoko|shasharamzhepoko]] || [[word:kakaramzhepoko|kakaramzhepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharamzhepoko|tharamzhepoko]] || [[word:jaramzhepoko|jaramzhepoko]] || [[word:sharamzhepoko|sharamzhepoko]] || [[word:karamzhepoko|karamzhepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharamzhepoko|tharamzhepoko]] || [[word:jaramzhepoko|jaramzhepoko]] || [[word:sharamzhepoko|sharamzhepoko]] || [[word:karamzhepoko|karamzhepoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
